## PR Checklist
- [ ] Branch is up to date with target (`develop` or `main`)
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] E2E tests updated (if UI flow changed)
- [ ] TypeScript strict mode passes (`npm run type-check`)
- [ ] No `console.log` or debug code left
- [ ] i18n keys extracted for all new UI text
- [ ] Expo Secure Store used for sensitive data
- [ ] Screens support dark mode
- [ ] Listeners/subscriptions cleaned up (no memory leaks)
- [ ] Accessibility labels added (`accessibilityLabel`)
- [ ] Myanmar font rendering verified (if text changes)

## Review Focus
- [ ] Logic correctness
- [ ] Performance (re-renders, memoization)
- [ ] Security (input validation, token handling)
- [ ] UI/UX consistency with v2.5 design tokens
